zh.lifeSummary: 當Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano於1250年8月15日出生在義大利皮蒙特諾瓦拉音沃利奧 音福利奧時，他的父親Teobaldo di Visconti20歲，母親Anastasia Pirovano24歲。他於1269年8月與Bonacossa Borri在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年6月24日在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾可雷札格享年71歲，埋葬在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano于1250年8月15日出生在意大利皮蒙特諾瓦拉音沃利奧 音福利奧时，他的父亲Teobaldo di Visconti20岁，母亲Anastasia Pirovano24岁。他于1269年8月与Bonacossa Borri在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1322年6月24日在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾可雷札格享年71岁，埋葬在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾。

nameMeanings.name: Visconti,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Pasquale, Rocco, Umberto, Amerigo, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Ennio, Gaetano, Gerlando, Gino.  French Laurent, Camille, Girard.

Italian: from visconte, a title of rank (medieval Latin vicecomes ‘deputy of a count’). Unusually (since most noble families took their surnames from their estates), the surname was sometimes of literal application, but without doubt it is also in part a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and graces, and in part a metonymic occupational name for someone in the employ of a viscount. This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Viscomi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Salvatore, Antonio, Beniamino, Filomena, Mario, Rodolfo, Santo.
Italian: Sicilian and Calabrian form of Visconti , from medieval Latin viscomes ‘deputy’, Greek biskōmēs.

nameMeanings.name: Matteo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

variants.name: Mattia
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano was born on 15 August 1250, in Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piedmont, Italy, his father, Teobaldo di Visconti, was 20 and his mother, Anastasia Pirovano, was 24. He married Bonacossa Borri in August 1269, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 24 June 1322, in Crescenzago, Milan, Lombardy, Italy, at the age of 71, and was buried in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano est né le 15 août 1250, à Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Teobaldo di Visconti, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anastasia Pirovano, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Bonacossa Borri en août 1269, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1322, à Crescenzago, Milano, Lombardia, Italie, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano am 15. August 1250 in Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Teobaldo di Visconti 20 und seine Mutter Anastasia Pirovano 24. Er hat im August 1269 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien Bonacossa Borri geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Juni 1322 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Crescenzago, Milano, Lombardei, Italien und wurde in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano è nato il il 15 agosto 1250 nel Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Italia, il suo padre, Teobaldo di Visconti, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Anastasia Pirovano, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Bonacossa Borri nel agosto 1269, nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 24 giugno 1322, nel Crescenzago, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milanoが1250年8月15日にイタリアピエモントノバーアインボリオ インフエリオアで生まれた時，父Teobaldo di Viscontiは20歳，母Anastasia Pirovanoは24歳であった。1269年8月にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノでBonacossa Borriと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年6月24日にイタリアロンバーディアミラノクレスセンザゴで71歳で死去し，イタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano(이)가 1250년 8월 15일 이탈리아 피몽 노바라 인보리오 인페리오어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Teobaldo di Visconti(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Anastasia Pirovano(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1269년 8월 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 Bonacossa Borri(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 6월 24일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 크레스스자고에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에 묻혔다.

mn.15 Aug 1250–24 Jun 1322: 1250 оны Наймдугаар сарын 15–1322 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 24

pt.15 Aug 1250–24 Jun 1322: 15 de agosto de 1250–24 de junho de 1322
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1250, em Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Teobaldo di Visconti, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Anastasia Pirovano, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Bonacossa Borri em agosto de 1269, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1322, em Crescenzago, Milano, Lombardia, Itália, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano родился 15 августа 1250 г. в местности инворио инфириор, новара, пиемонт, Италия, его отцу по имени Teobaldo di Visconti было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anastasia Pirovano, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Bonacossa Borri август 1269 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 24 июня 1322 г. в местности кресцензаго, милано, ломбардя, Италия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия.

es.15 Aug 1250–24 Jun 1322: 15 de agosto de 1250–24 de junio de 1322
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano nació el 15 de agosto de 1250, en Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Teobaldo di Visconti, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Anastasia Pirovano, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Bonacossa Borri en agosto de 1269, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 24 de junio de 1322, en Crescenzago, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia.
